channel.title: Materials Testing
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in Materials Testing

item.title: Frontmatter
item.description: Article by Nurcihan Duru, Sidem Kaner, Yavuz Kaplan, Nimet Kardes Sever, Alpay Ozer, Sinan Aksoz DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/mt-2024-frontmatter12

item.title: Bending moment calibration for rotational bending fatigue testing machine based on strain measurement
item.description: Article by Nurcihan Duru, Sidem Kaner, Yavuz Kaplan, Nimet Kardes Sever, Alpay Ozer, Sinan Aksoz DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/mt-2024-0147

item.title: Mechanical behavior of shape memory alloys considering the effects of body fluids corrosion for biomedical applications
item.description: Article by Nurcihan Duru, Sidem Kaner, Yavuz Kaplan, Nimet Kardes Sever, Alpay Ozer, Sinan Aksoz DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/mt-2024-0012

item.title: Impact of lattice designs and production parameters on mechanical properties of AlSi10Mg in laser powder bed fusion

item.description: Article by Nurcihan Duru, Sidem Kaner, Yavuz Kaplan, Nimet Kardes Sever, Alpay Ozer, Sinan Aksoz DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/mt-2024-0117

item.description: Article by Nurcihan Duru, Sidem Kaner, Yavuz Kaplan, Nimet Kardes Sever, Alpay Ozer, Sinan Aksoz DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/mt-2024-0204

item.description: Article by Nurcihan Duru, Sidem Kaner, Yavuz Kaplan, Nimet Kardes Sever, Alpay Ozer, Sinan Aksoz DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/mt-2024-0208

item.title: Wear properties of Al6061/SiC + B4C + TiC hybrid composites produced by vacuum infiltration method
